message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "eapli" {
  package "framework" {
    package "functional" {

      class "Functions" as Functions <<Utility>>
      class "MathFunctions" as MathFunctions <<Utility>>
      class "StandardFunctions" as StandardFunctions <<Utility>>
      class "Streams" as Streams <<Utility>>

      class "ArrayOfDoubleCollector" as ArrayOfDoubleCollector

      class "Either" as Either
      interface "Monad" as Monad
      class "ValueHistory" as ValueHistory

      class "EitherObjectObject" as EitherObjectObject
      class "MonadObject" as MonadObject
      class "ValueHistoryObject" as ValueHistoryObject

      ArrayOfDoubleCollector ..> ArrayOfDoubleCollector : ""

      Either "EMPTY" ..> EitherObjectObject
      EitherObjectObject ..> Either : ""

      Monad ..> MonadObject
      MonadObject ..> Monad : ""

      ValueHistory --> ValueHistoryObject : previous
    }
  }
}
@enduml
